title: Trebela

|region=*[[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Trebela system/Legends|Trebela system]]</ref>
*[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]]<ref name="Slice">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} places the [[Trebela system/Legends|Trebela system]], and therefore the celestial body Trebela, in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Altier sector/Legends|Altier sector]]. Furthermore, {{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-expansion-region|text=Essential Atlas Extra: Expansion Region}} depicts the Altier [[Sector/Legends|sector]] as being located between the [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroutes]] ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' identifies as the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] and the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]]. Finally, ''The Essential Atlas'' also designates the portion of the Expansion Region situated between those two [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]] as being a part of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]].</ref>

'''Trebela''' was a terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="Sourcebook2" /> located in the [[Trebela system/Legends|Trebela system]], a part of the [[Altier sector/Legends|Altier sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="Slice" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> A [[City/Legends|city]] on Trebela served as its [[Capital/Legends|capital]].<ref name="Sourcebook2" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Trebela was ruled by [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Kraxith]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. A major [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] network operated in Trebela's capital at that [[Time/Legends|time]],<ref name="Sourcebook2" /> and it was comprised of several Rebel groups that operated independently of each other, with no group being aware of the others' activities<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|261|Trebela}}</ref> or identities. Kraxit eventually broke up the network, and his surprise at the extent of the organization was eclipsed by the incredulity of the involved Rebel agents themselves.<ref name="Sourcebook2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Trebela was first mentioned in the [[1987]] ''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]'', which was authored by [[Bill Slavicsek]] and [[Curtis Smith]] and published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Sourcebook1">''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]''</ref> "[[Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are]]," a [[1990]] roleplaying game source article published in [[Voyages SF 13|''Voyages SF'' 13]], placed the Trebela [[Star system/Legends|system]] in a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of the [[Trebela sector|same name]]. Since that article was released outside of the [[Lucas Licensing]] process,<ref name="Twinkle">{{VoyagesCite|13|Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are}}</ref> it is considered non-[[canon]]ical with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="UnlicensedStatus">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Trebela system, and therefore Trebela itself, in grid square O-13.<ref name="TEA" />
